name: gittrix
description: Ephemeral storage router for AI coding agents

scripts.build: bun run --cwd packages/core build && bun run --cwd packages/adapter-local build && bun run --cwd packages/cli build
scripts.typecheck: bun run --cwd packages/core build && bun run --cwd packages/core typecheck && bun run --cwd packages/adapter-local build && bun run --cwd packages/adapter-local typecheck && bun run --cwd packages/cli typecheck
scripts.test: bun run --cwd packages/core test && bun run --cwd packages/adapter-local test && bun run --cwd packages/cli test
